hero_desc: Manage daily livestock operations with an all-in-one system. Easy control, total visibility – Anytime, Anywhere!
about_mission_desc: Providing modern livestock technology solutions to increase productivity and welfare of local farmers.
about_vision_desc: To become the number one integrated and easy-to-use livestock management platform worldwide.
why_desc: Manage your farm more efficiently and accurately with an integrated data system designed specifically for Indonesian farmers.
why_1_desc: Monitor all livestock information in real-time with high accuracy
why_2_desc: Automatic monitoring system for livestock health and vaccination
why_3_desc: Save up to 40% on operational time and costs with automation
services_desc: A complete solution to simplify all your farming needs.
services_1_desc: Store birth data, weight, and medical history digitally.
services_2_desc: Track vaccination schedules and animal health conditions.
services_3_desc: Get automatic reminders for important schedules.
testimonials_desc: Farmers and farm managers have experienced the ease and efficiency after using this system. Here are their thoughts on using FarmGo.
testimonials_1_text: "Since using FarmGo, recording livestock data has become much easier and organized. I can monitor health and development anytime without manual notes."
testimonials_2_text: "The vaccine and reproduction reminder feature is very helpful. No more missed schedules, everything is automatically recorded in the system."
testimonials_3_text: "The system is easy to use even for farmers who are not used to technology. Simple interface but complete functionality."
testimonials_4_text: "FarmGo helps me manage my farm more professionally. All livestock data is stored safely and can be accessed anytime."
contact_desc: We are ready to help with your farm management needs.
footer_brand_desc: A digital platform to help farmers manage livestock, feed, and production in a modern way.
footer_newsletter_desc: Get farming tips & latest FarmGo feature updates.
footer_copyright: © 2025 FarmGo. Digital Farming Solution for Indonesia.
